title: Supplementary data for plant-parasitic nematode virome paper
author: Huang, Huang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: To unravel the RNA virus diversity in plant-parasitic nematodes, we assembled approximately 536 Sequence Read Archive (SRA) runs (up to March 30, 2022) of RNA-seq data from 24 plant-parasitic nematode species for virus discovery.
steps_raw: To unravel the RNA virus diversity in plant-parasitic nematodes, we assembled approximately 536 Sequence Read Archive (SRA) runs (up to March 30, 2022) of RNA-seq data from 24 plant-parasitic nematode species for virus discovery.
